title: Pycreus macrostachyos
taxonomy: Pycreus macrostachyos is a species of sedge in the family Cyperaceae. It belongs to the genus Pycreus, which is a group of grass-like plants commonly known as nut sedges. The classification of Pycreus macrostachyos is as follows: kingdom Plantae, division Magnoliophyta, class Liliopsida, order Poales, family Cyperaceae, genus Pycreus, species P. macrostachyos. The family Cyperaceae is a large and diverse group of monocots that includes many species of sedges. The classification of Pycreus macrostachyos reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the Poales order.
